title: Finish the claim: concede, then hold
evidence: fill-in frame 'Although ___, ___ because ___'; produce new claim, no provided draft

title: Write a counterclaim-aware claim on your own
evidence: cold write, 'no frame'; write ONE counterclaim-aware claim

title: Write a counterclaim-aware claim on a NEW topic
evidence: cold write on NEW topic, no frame

title: Write a concede-and-hold claim
evidence: fill-in frame 'Although ___, ___ because ___'; produce new claim

title: Write a concede-and-hold claim on your own
evidence: cold write, 'no frame'

title: Write a concede-and-hold claim on a NEW topic
evidence: cold write on NEW topic

title: Concede and answer in two sentences
evidence: given POSITION starter, then WRITE new CONCEDE + ANSWER sentences (build onto position, no draft to fix)

title: Write a full counterargument paragraph
evidence: 'build the whole paragraph' from prompt, no draft

title: Write a counterargument paragraph on a NEW topic
evidence: write full paragraph on NEW topic, no draft

title: Write a claim about the craft
evidence: fill-in frame 'Chopin uses ___ to ___'; produce new claim

title: Write an analytical claim on your own
evidence: cold write, 'no frame'

title: Write an analytical claim on a NEW text
evidence: write new analytical claim on NEW text

title: Write a craft claim on a close call
evidence: fill-in frame 'Chopin ___ so ___'; produce new claim

title: Write a craft claim on your own
evidence: cold write, 'no frame'

title: Write a craft claim on a NEW text
evidence: write new craft claim on NEW text

title: Name a device and state its effect
evidence: fill-in frame 'Chopin uses ___ so ___'; produce new sentence

title: Write a device-to-effect sentence on your own
evidence: cold write, 'no frame'

title: Write a device-to-effect sentence on a NEW text
evidence: write new device-to-effect sentence on NEW text

title: Add the warrant to a device-to-effect statement
evidence: given device+effect starter, fill-in frame to ADD a warrant (extend, not fix a draft)

title: Write a device-effect-warrant passage on your own
evidence: cold write full DEW passage, 'no frame'

title: Write a device-effect-warrant passage on a NEW text
evidence: write new DEW passage on NEW text

title: Chain two choices toward one point
evidence: fill-in frame 'The author ___ then ___ so ___'; produce new paragraph

title: Write a device-chain paragraph on your own
evidence: cold write chain paragraph, 'no frame'

title: Write a device-chain paragraph on a NEW text
evidence: write new chain paragraph on NEW text

title: Revise the summary paragraph into analysis
evidence: setapart 'Paragraph to revise:' present with embedded summary draft; 'Revise ... into analysis'

title: Revise a provided paragraph on your own
evidence: setapart 'Paragraph to revise:' present with embedded draft; 'Revise the summary paragraph'

title: Revise a summary paragraph on a NEW text
evidence: setapart 'Paragraph to revise:' present with embedded draft on NEW text

title: Revise: one delete, one add
evidence: intro embeds Draft '...' with off-purpose sentence; 'Revise this draft'; frame is revision scaffold

title: Revise a provided draft on your own
evidence: intro embeds Draft '...'; 'Revise so every sentence serves the point'

title: Revise a provided draft on a NEW topic
evidence: intro embeds Draft '...' on NEW topic; 'Revise so every sentence serves the point'

title: Reorder a scrambled draft
evidence: intro embeds three scrambled sentences; 'Reorder these ... write them in the new order'

title: Reorder a provided draft on your own
evidence: intro embeds sentences to reorder; 'Reorder a provided draft'

title: Reorder a provided draft on a NEW topic
evidence: intro embeds sentences to reorder on NEW topic

title: Rewrite the weak twin using the frame
evidence: intro embeds weak twin quote; 'Turn this weak twin into a strong one', replace the circular reason (transform draft)

title: Improve a weak draft on your own
evidence: setapart 'Weak draft:' present; 'Turn this weak twin into a strong one'

title: Improve a weak draft on a NEW topic
evidence: setapart 'Weak draft:' present on NEW topic; 'Turn this weak twin into a strong one'

title: Name the type and fix the draft
evidence: setapart 'Draft to diagnose:' present; 'rewrite the draft'

title: Name the type and fix a draft on your own
evidence: setapart 'Draft to diagnose:' present; 'rewrite the draft'

title: Name the type and fix a draft on a NEW topic
evidence: setapart 'Draft to diagnose:' present on NEW topic; 'rewrite the draft'

title: Revise the draft for purpose
evidence: setapart 'Draft to revise:' present; 'Revise the draft ... combining all three moves'

title: Revise a provided draft on your own
evidence: setapart 'Draft to revise:' present; 'Revise the draft'

title: Revise a provided draft on a NEW topic
evidence: setapart 'Draft to revise:' present on NEW topic; 'Revise the draft'

title: Weave two sources into one point
evidence: setapart 'Fill in this frame:' (fill-in frame); weave two sources into a new point, no draft

title: Write a woven point on your own
evidence: cold write woven point, 'no frame'

title: Write a woven point on a NEW set
evidence: write new woven point on NEW set

title: Name the agreement and the tension
evidence: setapart 'Fill in this frame:' (fill-in frame); produce new relationship sentence, no draft

title: Name agreement and tension on your own
evidence: cold write, 'no frame'

title: Name agreement and tension on a NEW set
evidence: write new agreement/tension sentence on NEW set

title: Revise the provided cross-text draft
evidence: setapart 'Draft to revise:' present; 'Revise the draft ... close both synthesis gaps'

title: Revise a provided cross-text draft on your own
evidence: setapart 'Draft to revise:' present; 'Revise the draft'

title: Revise a cross-text draft on a NEW set
evidence: setapart 'Draft to revise:' present on NEW set; 'Revise the draft'

title: Run a precision pass on the provided draft
evidence: setapart 'Paragraph to revise:' present; 'Run a precision pass on the paragraph below'

title: Run the precision pass on your own
evidence: setapart 'Paragraph to revise:' present; 'Run a precision pass'

title: Run a precision pass on a NEW topic
evidence: setapart 'Paragraph to revise:' present on NEW topic; 'Run a precision pass'
